name: Pan Ocean Co., Ltd.
summary: Pan Ocean Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides marine transportation and other related services worldwide. It operates through four segments: Bulk Carrier Service, Container Service, Tanker Service, and Other Shipping Services. The company offers break bulk liner services for steel, coal, wood, equipment, and machinery cargoes; tramper services for dry bulk cargo shipping, such as iron ore, coal, grain, sugar, logs, minerals, and scrap iron; large bulker services for dry bulk cargo comprising grain, coal, minerals, and iron ore; and container services. It also provides tanker services for palm oil, crude oil, naptha, gasoline, diesel, kerosene, jet fuel, and heavy oil for power generation; oils and fats; and petrochemicals, which comprise benzene, toluene, xylene, base oil, and caustic soda, as well as liquefied natural gas carrier services. In addition, the company offers heavy lifter services for large equipment, machinery, devices, etc.; and tug boats, drill ships, barges, ocean platforms, etc. Further, it is involved in the trading and logistics of agriculture products, such as corn, soybean, wheat, and soybean meal. The company was formerly known as STX Pan Ocean Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Pan Ocean Co., Ltd. in January 2014. Pan Ocean Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea. Pan Ocean Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Harim Holdings Co., Ltd.
